) } const AppRoutes = () => { const navigate = useNavigate() const [products] = useState(productsSeed) const [cart, setCart] = useState([]) const [favorites, setFavorites] = useState([]) const addToCart = (productId: string, qty: number = 1, size?: CartItem['size']) => { setCart((prev) => { const keyMatch = prev.find((c) => c.productId === productId && c.size === size) if (keyMatch) { return prev.map((c) => (c.id === keyMatch.id ? { ...c, qty: c.qty + qty } : c)) } const newItem: CartItem = { id: Math.random().toString(36).slice(2), productId, qty, size, } return [newItem, ...prev] }) } const updateQty = (cartId: string, qty: number) => { setCart((prev) => prev.map((c) => (c.id === cartId ? { ...c, qty } : c))) } const removeCartItem = (cartId: string) => { setCart((prev) => prev.filter((c) => c.id !== cartId)) } const toggleFavorite = (productId: string) => { setFavorites((prev) => (prev.includes(productId) ? prev.filter((id) => id !== productId) : [productId, ...prev])) } const checkout = () => { if (cart.length === 0) return alert('Thank you for your order! Your items are on the way ✨') setCart([]) navigate('/') } const cartCount = cart.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.qty, 0) const favoritesCount = favorites.length const openProduct = (id: string) => navigate(`/product/${id}`) const navToCatalog = (opts?: { category?: string; q?: string }) => { const params = new URLSearchParams() if (opts?.category) params.set('category', opts.category) if (opts?.q) params.set('q', opts.q) const search = params.toString() navigate(`/catalog${search ? `?${search}` : ''}`) } const featured = products.slice(0, 8) return ( navToCatalog(opts)} featured={featured} favorites={favorites} onToggleFavorite={(id) => toggleFavorite(id)} onAddToCart={(id) => addToCart(id, 1)} onOpenProduct={(id) => openProduct(id)} /> } /> toggleFavorite(id)} onAddToCart={(id) => addToCart(id, 1)} onOpenProduct={(id) => openProduct(id)} /> } /> toggleFavorite(id)} onAddToCartWithSize={(id, qty, size) => addToCart(id, qty, size)} /> } /> updateQty(cartId, qty)} onRemove={(cartId) => removeCartItem(cartId)} onCheckout={() => checkout()} /> } /> toggleFavorite(id)} onAddToCart={(id) => addToCart(id, 1)} onOpenProduct={(id) => openProduct(id)} /> } /> } />
